title: Refreshing Polish Mint Pudding
description: A cool and creamy dessert featuring the flavors of Poland, perfect for hot summer days.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the pudding and vodka (if using).
Fold in the chopped mint leaves.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional mint leaves if desired.
